title: (Bullish Signal) ALNY, price moved above its 50-day Moving Average on Nov 13 2020
author: tickeron_community
selftext:
This price move could indicate a change in the trend, and may be a buy signal for investors. Tickeron's A.I.dvisor found 46 similar cases, and 45 were successful. Based on this data, the odds of success are 90%. Current price $130.48 crossed the resistance line at $132.74 and is trading between $132.74 resistance and $121.37 support lines. Throughout the month of 10/14/20 - 11/13/20, the price experienced a -6% Downtrend, while the week of 11/06/20 - 11/13/20 shows a +4% Uptrend.

https://preview.redd.it/5qh8mwefpmz51.png?width=1532&format=png&auto=webp&s=eac758d16eb29eadc07dfeae33efd6f3773b54af

**Bullish Trend Analysis**

The RSI Oscillator points to a transition from a downward trend to an upward trend -- in cases where ALNY's RSI Oscillator exited the oversold zone, 29 of 35 resulted in an increase in price. Tickeron's analysis proposes that the odds of a continued upward trend are 83%.

The Momentum Indicator moved above the 0 level on November 11, 2020. You may want to consider a long position or call options on ALNY as a result. Tickeron A.I. detected that in 70 of 81 past instances where the momentum indicator moved above 0, the stock continued to climb. The odds of a continued upward trend are 86%.

The Moving Average Convergence Divergence (MACD) for ALNY just turned positive on November 12, 2020. Looking at past instances where ALNY's MACD turned positive, the stock continued to rise, Tickeron A.I. shows that in 33 of 41 cases over the following month. The odds of a continued upward trend are 80%.

Following a +4.97% 3-day Advance, the price is estimated to grow further. Considering data from situations where ALNY advanced for three days, Tickeron A.I. detected that in 274 of 335 cases, the price rose further within the following month. The odds of a continued upward trend are 82%.

ALNY may jump back above the lower band and head toward the middle band. Traders may consider buying the stock or exploring call options.
